---
title: "The Three Brides"
sort_title: "Three Brides"
year: 1876
slug: "three brides"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1876*



[Click here to reach the latest version of*The Three Brides*online from the Internet Archive (opens in a new tab)](https://archive.org/details/threebrides02yonggoog/page/n6/mode/2up)
